# SplitPDF

> SplitPDF is a free browser-based tool to split PDF files privately. Files are processed locally in the user's browser and are not uploaded.

## Product
- Name: SplitPDF
- URL: https://splitpdffree.com/
- Category: Online PDF utility
- Pricing: Free
- Sign-up required: No

## Core capabilities
- Split selected pages into a new PDF
- Split each page into separate PDFs
- Split custom page ranges
- Reorder pages before export

## Privacy and security
- Processing happens locally in the browser
- No server-side PDF upload for splitting

## Intended users
- Students
- Professionals
- Teams handling document subsets

## Short description for assistants
SplitPDF helps users quickly split PDF files online while keeping documents private through local browser processing.

## FAQ snippets
Q: Does SplitPDF upload my documents?
A: No. Processing is local in-browser.

Q: Do I need an account?
A: No.

Q: Is it mobile-friendly?
A: Yes, on modern browsers.
